CustomField.description: Salesforce User ID of the default client-side approver for work-approval queue rows. Stamped onto WorkRequest__c.ApproverUserLookup__c at submit time so getPendingForApprover surfaces the queue to the right person. Custom Settings only support primitive types, so this is a Text(18) User ID rather than a lookup — same pattern as WatcherDigestRecipientUserIdsTxt__c. Blank (default) = pending requests are created unassigned and any authorised caller may decide (they are stamped as the approver).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 18-character Salesforce User ID of the default approver. Blank = pending requests start unassigned.
CustomField.label: Approver User ID
